name: Family
desc: The universal icon for a nuclear family. This emoji is essential for content regarding parenting, domestic life, and core family values.

name: Family: Man, Woman, Girl, Boy
desc: Represents a diverse household with two children. Ideal for SEO content focused on family vacations, school activities, and household management.

name: Family: Man, Woman, Girl
desc: A specific representation of parents with a daughter. Perfect for 'girl dad' and 'mother-daughter' themed lifestyle blogs.

name: Family: Man, Woman, Boy
desc: Depicts parents with a son. High-value for content regarding raising boys, sports families, and father-son or mother-son bonding.

name: Family: Woman, Boy
desc: A dedicated icon for single-parent households. Essential for inclusive SEO targeting single moms and independent parenting communities.

name: Family: Man, Boy
desc: Represents single fathers raising a son. Used to highlight the unique journey of solo dads and fatherhood mentorship.

name: Family: Woman, Woman, Girl
desc: An inclusive symbol for LGBTQ+ parenting. Perfect for diverse family representation and Pride-related family content.

name: Family: Man, Man, Boy
desc: Represents a family with two dads. A key emoji for modern parenting blogs and inclusive family marketing.

name: Pregnant Woman
desc: The primary icon for maternity, pregnancy announcements, and expecting a new family member. High search volume for baby shower content.

name: Breastfeeding
desc: Symbolizes infant care and the early stages of motherhood. Vital for SEO content on postpartum health and newborn essentials.

name: Baby
desc: The universal sign for a newborn or infant. Used in content regarding baby gear, nursery design, and new parent tips.

name: Old Woman
desc: Represents the matriarch or grandmother. Ideal for content about family heritage, multi-generational homes, and Grandparents' Day.

name: Old Man
desc: Represents the patriarch or grandfather. Used in SEO for retirement, elder care, and family legacy stories.

name: House
desc: The ultimate symbol for the family residence. Core keyword for real estate, home improvement, and 'staying at home' lifestyle posts.

name: House with Garden
desc: Represents suburban living and family gardening. Ideal for landscaping, yard work, and family-friendly neighborhood content.

name: Family: Man, Woman, Girl, Girl
desc: Depicts a family with two daughters. Great for targeting content about sisterhood and female-heavy households.

name: Family: Man, Man, Girl, Boy
desc: A diverse representation of a larger family with two fathers, showing modern household dynamics.

name: Family: Woman, Girl, Boy
desc: Highlights the strength of single-mother households with multiple children.

name: Houses
desc: Represents the community and neighborhood environment where families grow and interact.

name: Deciduous Tree
desc: Commonly used as a metaphor for a 'Family Tree.' Perfect for genealogy, ancestry, and deep-rooted family history content.
